commands.author: clawsweeper[bot]
commands.review_summary:
The PR changes auth-profile save handling to keep external OAuth profiles out of persisted auth files while adding regression coverage for `anthropic:claude-cli` remaining available in-process after save.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main writes the disk-filtered `localStore` into active runtime snapshots, and the PR still misses save inputs that do not already contain the external profile. I did not run tests because this review is constrained to read-only inspection.
commands.review_followup: A narrow automated repair is possible: preserve runtime external profiles for disk-only save inputs and add focused regression coverage.

target.title: Preserve runtime external auth snapshots
target.author: turbotheturtle

commands.reason: author association CONTRIBUTOR and repository permission none are not allowed
